title: Live updates: Scripps National Spelling Bee finalists face off in D.C. — Quick Post

The Trump administration has been holding talks about putting President Trump’s face on a newly created $250 bill, though Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the idea would need to be approved by Congress
